description: Determines the role and perception of magic in a fantasy world.

descriptionTranslations.en: Determines the role and perception of magic in a fantasy world.

entries.result: Common and Everyday: Magic is everywhere in this world and is just a part of daily life for all

resultTranslations.en: Common and Everyday: Magic is everywhere in this world and is just a part of daily life for all

entries.result: Rare and Mysterious: Magic is known, but it is rare and widely misunderstood

resultTranslations.en: Rare and Mysterious: Magic is known, but it is rare and widely misunderstood

entries.result: Powerful and Controlled: Magic is powerful in this world, but is strictly controlled in most places through legal and social means. Existing power structures try to keep it in their own hands

resultTranslations.en: Powerful and Controlled: Magic is powerful in this world, but is strictly controlled in most places through legal and social means. Existing power structures try to keep it in their own hands

entries.result: Powerful and Elite: Magic is known and powerful, but very few are capable of wielding it

resultTranslations.en: Powerful and Elite: Magic is known and powerful, but very few are capable of wielding it

entries.result: Rare and Disbelieved: Magic exists but it is so rare that most people don't believe in it

resultTranslations.en: Rare and Disbelieved: Magic exists but it is so rare that most people don't believe in it

entries.result: Magic is Revered: Those who can control and cast magic are viewed with awe by most

resultTranslations.en: Magic is Revered: Those who can control and cast magic are viewed with awe by most

entries.result: Magic is Feared: Those who can control and cast magic are feared by most, who dread the chaotic and corrupting influence of dark powers (whether that is true or not)

resultTranslations.en: Magic is Feared: Those who can control and cast magic are feared by most, who dread the chaotic and corrupting influence of dark powers (whether that is true or not)

entries.result: Bestowed: Those who can wield magic have had the power bestowed upon them. This may be through birth, hereditary lineage, through a special process, etc.

resultTranslations.en: Bestowed: Those who can wield magic have had the power bestowed upon them. This may be through birth, hereditary lineage, through a special process, etc.

entries.result: Religious: Magic and religion are intertwined, with most believing magical power is gifted from the gods

resultTranslations.en: Religious: Magic and religion are intertwined, with most believing magical power is gifted from the gods

entries.description: Roll one more Keyword from the Adventure Tone Meaning table for a total of three Keywords to make your interpretation

descriptionTranslations.en: Roll one more Keyword from the Adventure Tone Meaning table for a total of three Keywords to make your interpretation
